name: append_feishu_sheet_values
description: Appends rows to a worksheet. The range should be the header row of the target table, e.g. "Sheet1!A1:E1" or "{sheetId}!A1:E1". The API uses this range to determine the columns and appends the provided rows below existing data.

spreadsheetToken.description: Feishu spreadsheet token (required). Found in the URL: https://xxx.feishu.cn/sheets/{spreadsheetToken}. Typically starts with "shtc".

range.description: Cell range in A1 notation (required). Examples: "A1:E1" (active sheet), "{sheetId}!A1:E1" (specific sheet by ID), "Sheet1!A1:E1" (specific sheet by title). For multi-sheet spreadsheets, always prefix with sheetId or sheet title to avoid ambiguity. Use a header row range.

valueInputOption.description: How the input data should be interpreted. USER_ENTERED: formulas/parsing applied; RAW: stored as-is.
